payload: Step 9: Implement availability rule storage and admin endpoints - Weekly availability rules, date overrides, blocked time ranges (with RRULE), scheduling limits. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 9 for details.
tests: pass, lint: pass (1 warning in schema - pre-existing), typecheck: pass

Step 10: Build availability engine - Generate available dates and time slots with full rule enforcement. AvailabilityEngine class with: dates endpoint (available dates), times endpoint (time slots), check endpoint (availability validation). Include timezone handling with Luxon, RRULE for recurring blocked time, resource constraints, capacity enforcement. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 10 for algorithm details.
tests: pass (20/20), lint: pass, typecheck: pass

Step 11: Implement appointments CRUD with rule enforcement - List with cursor pagination, create with availability check and transaction locking, update details, cancel/reschedule/no-show operations. Handle race conditions with serializable transactions and retry logic. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 11 for details.

Step 11 complete: appointments CRUD routes implemented with list/get/create/update/cancel/reschedule/noShow operations, serializable transactions, row locking, retry logic. tests: pass, typecheck: pass, lint: pass

Step 12: Build admin UI CRUD flows - Create TanStack Router routes for appointments (list/new), calendars (with availability editor), appointment-types (with resource assignment), locations, and resources. Use shadcn/ui components (tables, forms, dialogs). Integrate oRPC queries via @orpc/tanstack-query. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 12 for details.

Step 12 complete: Admin UI CRUD flows implemented - appointments, calendars, appointment-types, locations, resources routes with shadcn/ui components. tests: 90 pass, lint: pass, typecheck: pass. Uncommitted changes ready for commit.

Commit the admin UI CRUD flows implementation (Step 12). Stage all admin-ui changes including new routes (appointments, calendars, appointment-types, locations, resources), shadcn/ui components, and related api changes. Commit message: feat(@scheduling/admin-ui): Add CRUD flows for appointments, calendars, and resources. After commit, close task task-1769274243-06b4.
Step 12 committed: b05ae22, 27 files, typecheck: pass, lint: pass, tests: 90 pass

Step 13: Add webhook/event outbox + BullMQ job processing - Set up BullMQ with Valkey, create event outbox processing worker, implement webhook delivery with retry logic. Events to emit on: appointment create/update/cancel/reschedule, CRUD for calendars/appointment-types/resources/locations. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 13 for details.
Step 13 complete: webhook/event outbox + BullMQ job processing. tests: pass, lint: pass, typecheck: pass

Step 14: Add API tokens + external REST hardening - Implement API token model in @scheduling/db, add token issuance/revocation endpoints, create token auth middleware (parallel to session auth), implement token scopes (admin/staff), ensure RLS context works with token auth, add rate limiting middleware, standardize pagination across list endpoints. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 14 for details.
Step 14 complete: tests pass, lint pass, typecheck pass, commit f4bb46f

Step 15: Add audit logging and finalize - Add audit_events table to @scheduling/db, emit audit records on mutations (create/update/delete/cancel/reschedule), store actor/action/entity/before-after snapshots, create audit log query endpoint, update README with setup instructions and architecture overview. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md Step 15 for details.
Step 15: Add audit logging - tests: pass, lint: pass, typecheck: pass. Added audit_events table, audit service, audit routes, and README.

Commit Step 15 (audit logging) changes. Stage the audit-related files: apps/api/src/routes/audit.ts, apps/api/src/services/audit.ts, apps/api/src/routes/appointments.ts, apps/api/src/routes/index.ts, packages/db/src/schema/index.ts, packages/dto/src/schemas/audit.ts, packages/dto/src/schemas/index.ts, packages/db/src/migrations/, and README.md. Commit message: feat(@scheduling/api): Add audit logging with change history. After successful commit, verify all tasks are closed.
Committed audit logging (e71ef3e). All 15 tasks closed. Implementation complete.
